name: Swing Loose Indoor Golf
address: Bell Works Complex, 101 Crawfords Corner Rd, Holmdel, NJ 07733
about: Swing Loose Indoor Golf provides an all-weather golf experience using advanced TrackMan technology. The venue features a relaxed, social atmosphere with private bays available for hourly rental, accommodating up to six guests. It combines recreational play with performance analysis, making it suitable for both casual players and serious golfers looking to improve their game. The facility also offers professional golf lessons, club fittings, and event hosting capabilities.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced TrackMan technology provides precise real-time swing analysis
Flexible bay rentals for individuals and groups with BYOB policy
Access to professional golf lessons and custom club fitting services
Virtual play on world-famous golf courses with high-definition graphics

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB policy allows guests to bring their own food
BYOB policy allows guests to bring their own alcoholic beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: Cutting-edge technology for real-time swing and ball tracking
Advanced launch monitor for detailed performance analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but rentals are available if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, Swing Loose operates on a BYOB policy, allowing guests to bring their own food and alcoholic beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time varies by player skill and pace, but typically 18 holes take 1-2 hours per bay depending on group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Swing Loose welcomes families and offers a relaxed environment suitable for all ages.
